ABOUT.INTRO: I am a Front-end developer based in Stuttgart, Germany. I enjoy helping designers and companies bring their ideas into real life. I am looking forward to continuing my developer career with a job in a junior web developer position. If you think I'd be a good match for your projects, contact me!

PORTFOLIO.TITLE: Portfolio
PORTFOLIO.INTRO: Explore a selection of my work here - interact with projects to see my skills in action

JOIN.TITLE: Join
JOIN.DESCRIPTION: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

POLLO_LOCO.TITLE: Pollo Loco
POLLO_LOCO.DESCRIPTION: Jump, run and throw game based on object-oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and tabasco salsa to fight against the crazy hen.

POKEDEX.TITLE: Pokédex
POKEDEX.DESCRIPTION: Based on the PokéAPI a simple library that provides and catalogues pokemon information.
